case_title: CHOW, HOI YUEN vs. O'BRIEN, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, HOI YUEN AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, HOI YUEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1503 22ND AVENUE $5,928.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,428.00, STIPULATED-- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
